form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after two years lost his rider at this track on March 23 over 3900m. Previously second-up won by 0.8 len this track on March 25 2024 over 3400m on heavy track defeating Fulltime Speed with 70kg at $1.80 in a hurdle. Rates strongly and looks a chance on best.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 36 day letup. Last run finished third of 13 starters at Auteuil on March 1 over 4400m, 6 len behind King S Boum carrying 68kg at $10. Race before fell at Pau on February 8 over 4700m. Will prove hard to beat on best form.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Last outing came from midfield and won by 2.5 len Strasbourg on March 22 over 3800m defeating Imperium with 67.5kg at $4 in a hurdle.
